title: Story Mode Revamped
description:
🎮 Minecraft Story Mode - Revamped
| Relive Telltale’s adventure inside Minecraft itself.
body:
## 🧱 Overview
**Minecraft Story Mode - Revamped** brings the cinematic magic of *Minecraft: Story Mode* straight into modern Minecraft.  
This isn’t just a texture pack - it’s a full **visual and audio overhaul** designed to make your world feel like it came straight out of Telltale’s universe.

Whether you’re wielding the **King Sword**, exploring in the **Redstone Riot Armor**, or hearing Story Mode’s classic sounds echo across your world, this pack turns every play session into an episode of your own adventure.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🧍‍♂️ Story Mode Items
Over **50+ rename-triggered textures** let you transform your tools and armor into legendary Story Mode gear!

📘 *A full rename list is included in your download:*  
`Rename List.txt`

---

### 🎨 Visual Overhaul
- Remade **armor, weapons, and GUI** to look like Minecraft: Story Mode  
- Updated **HUD, inventory, and icons** for a cinematic look  
- **Story Mode main menu** and title screen rework (use Loading Backgrounds)
- Optional **emissive highlights** (works with OptiFine or Continuity)
- Enchant glint that looks like the Minecraft: Story Mode one!

---

### 🔊 Audio & Ambience
- Authentic **Story Mode sound effects** and cues  
- **Remixed music and ambience** matching Telltale’s tone  
- Themed **menu music** and subtle environment changes  

---

### 🧱 World & Extras
- Command Block retextures and glowing details 
- Stylized **sky palette** and enhanced lighting  
- Updated **UI buttons**, **pause screens**, and **fonts**
- Wither made to look like the Wither Storm
- Textures from before 1.14 to add to the feel

---

## 🛠️ Compatibility
- ✅ **Minecraft 1.21 to 1.21.4**  
- ✅ Works on **vanilla**, **OptiFine**, and **Fabric** clients  
- 🧩 Full **CIT** support for rename-based textures  
- 🎮 Compatible with **servers** (no mods required)

💡 *OptiFine or Fabric’s Entity Model Features (EMF) + CEM are recommended for emissive textures and 3D models, also use Loading Backgrounds for loading screens. If you want the Story Mode: Season 2 background, use Simple Menu and follow their instructions, the background.png is in assets/simplemenu*

---

## 📘 Rename Guide
Use an **anvil** to rename your items exactly as shown to unlock the custom Story Mode variants!


⚠️ *Names are case-sensitive — type them exactly as listed!*

---

## 🔮 Planned Additions
- Story Mode–themed **mobs and bosses** 
- (Wither Storm phase (DONE IN 2.0), etc.)  
- **Custom particles** and cinematic FX  
- **Shader preset** for Story Mode lighting (use Super Duper Vanilla shaders)  

---

## 🧩 Credits
Created by **[N0vaspikz]**  
Inspired by *Minecraft: Story Mode* by **Telltale Games** and **Mojang Studios**.  
All textures and sounds recreated for non-commercial fan use.

---

## 📦 Download Includes
- 🎨 Full **Minecraft Story Mode - Revamped** resource pack  
- 🎵 Soundtrack integration  

---

## ❤️ Support & Feedback
If you enjoy this pack, leave a ⭐ on Modrinth and share your screenshots!  
Have feedback or suggestions? Open an issue or comment on the Modrinth page.

---

> *Step into the world of Story Mode once again - and craft your own legend.*
